# Academica

*Cicero · 45 BCE*

A dialogue devoted to the theory of knowledge, opposing Stoic [dogmatism](../glossary/dogmatism.md) and its criterion of the [kataleptic impression](../glossary/kataleptic-impression.md) to the [scepticism](../glossary/skepticism.md) of the New Academy. It is a major source for ancient epistemology.
